chunk-c3dae68a7b53635586ac56b2c7a0e752.content:
NCR Report: INC-7C5EA02D
Date: 2025-12-31 | System: Propulsion | Severity: medium
Narrative: Scheduled phase maintenance on Propulsion system (asset AVION-760) at Receiving Dock revealed anomalous wear pattern on switch. Visual inspection confirmed corrosion consistent with thermal cycling. Inspection also noted micro-crack indication at the root fitting. Component was tagged as unserviceable. medium classification applied. Corrective action initiated under work order WO-72829.
Corrective Action: adjusted clearances per maintenance manual; documented in log; no further action

chunk-0bdf2417781acafaa10b011ecd70d095.content:
NCR Report: INC-648887DB
Date: 2025-12-30 | System: Fuel System | Severity: low
Narrative: Scheduled out-of-phase maintenance on Fuel System system (asset HYD-222) at Bay C revealed anomalous wear pattern on bracket. Visual inspection confirmed corrosion consistent with fatigue loading. Inspection also noted contamination at the aft attachment point. Component was tagged as unserviceable. low classification applied. Corrective action initiated under work order WO-81763.
Corrective Action: replaced the defective component and conducted post-maintenance functional test

chunk-ecb51acaeb83a4650a7c25bb48021048.content:
NCR Report: INC-7128F761
Date: 2025-12-31 | System: Avionics | Severity: low
Narrative: Scheduled out-of-phase maintenance on Avionics system (asset ENG-924) at Bay A revealed anomalous wear pattern on regulator. Visual inspection confirmed delamination consistent with manufacturing variance. Inspection also noted contamination at the forward bulkhead. Component was tagged as unserviceable. low classification applied. Corrective action initiated under work order WO-59488.
Corrective Action: adjusted clearances per maintenance manual; documented in log; no further action

chunk-8ea194d6b2ae51ec2cc94fa3e2e2ea6d.content:
NCR Report: INC-BEC46687
Date: 2025-12-31 | System: Hydraulics | Severity: critical
Narrative: Scheduled 500-hour maintenance on Hydraulics system (asset ENG-800) at Bay A revealed anomalous wear pattern on cylinder. Visual inspection confirmed surface damage consistent with thermal cycling. Inspection also noted loose fastener at the forward bulkhead. Component was tagged as unserviceable. critical classification applied. Corrective action initiated under work order WO-49945.
Corrective Action: submitted component for metallurgical analysis; installed serviceable spare

chunk-c7c8d696a50a4e06df36464a5de65ce8.content:
NCR Report: INC-A932CCA5
Date: 2025-12-31 | System: Hydraulics | Severity: low
Narrative: Quality control inspection of batch LOT-5801 (product: Bracket Assy A) identified crack affecting the filter interface on 2 of 43 units inspected. The non-conformance originated from in-process machining and was discovered at Line 3. Severity: low. All affected units quarantined. NCR-2025-9221 raised. Root cause analysis initiated; preliminary findings suggest operator error.
Corrective Action: isolated and replaced failed sensor; calibrated replacement unit; verified

chunk-29d20847544f3a4c5b00e5237c4c45e6.content:
NCR Report: INC-F828ED92
Date: 2025-12-30 | System: Pneumatics | Severity: high
Narrative: Post-repair inspection of FRAME-255 (Pneumatics/seal) conducted at Receiving Dock following scheduled overhaul revealed residual vibration. The condition was unexpected given prior repair documentation. Severity reclassified from low to high after detailed dimensional check using ultrasonic thickness gauge. Additional inspection of fleet assets ASSET-233 through ASSET-369 recommended. Finding logged as FIND-86931.
Corrective Action: drained and flushed system; replaced filter and seals; pressure-tested

chunk-34be8c47cbd93b4035e8b7fcf4045598.content:
NCR Report: INC-3A962ACE
Date: 2025-12-30 | System: Mechanical | Severity: critical
Narrative: During routine pre-flight inspection on Line 1, technician TECH-621 observed a crack on the compressor of the Mechanical system for asset HYD-908. The crack was located at the forward bulkhead and measured approximately 2.5 cm. Adjacent components appeared serviceable. The finding was classified as critical severity per maintenance manual chapter 55. Component at 78% of its life limit. Work order WO-19007 was raised and the unit was removed from service pending repair.
Corrective Action: submitted component for metallurgical analysis; installed serviceable spare

chunk-25fd1aa294a91de033c300945428111f.content:
NCR Report: INC-6BC28D4E
Date: 2025-12-31 | System: Structural | Severity: informational
Narrative: Asset ASSET-792 (Structural system) was brought in for unscheduled maintenance at Test Bench after operator reported intermittent fault during taxi-out. Inspection revealed vibration on the filter, serial number SN-195027. The vibration showed signs of recent initiation indicating the condition had been developing over approximately 6 weeks. Engineering was notified per procedure AMM-54-13-976. Severity assessed as informational.
Corrective Action: replaced the defective component and conducted post-maintenance functional test

chunk-79353c93e487c2be25d49069b222e15f.content:
NCR Report: INC-DD419329
Date: 2025-12-30 | System: Avionics | Severity: medium
Narrative: During routine annual inspection on Assembly Area, technician TECH-104 observed a surface damage on the piston of the Avionics system for asset FRAME-924. The surface damage was located at the aft attachment point and measured approximately 0.8 inch. Adjacent components appeared corroded at interface. The finding was classified as medium severity per maintenance manual chapter 83. Component at 78% of its life limit. Work order WO-21351 was raised and the unit was removed from service pending repair.
Corrective Action: submitted component for metallurgical analysis; installed serviceable spare

chunk-eb03471c7bdd75de342630c5a5deb826.content:
NCR Report: INC-35334884
Date: 2025-12-31 | System: Fuel System | Severity: medium
Narrative: Quality control inspection of batch LOT-9352 (product: Bracket Assy A) identified crack affecting the harness interface on 3 of 21 units inspected. The non-conformance originated from heat treatment and was discovered at Paint Shop. Severity: medium. All affected units quarantined. NCR-2025-8873 raised. Root cause analysis initiated; preliminary findings suggest raw material deviation.
Corrective Action: submitted component for metallurgical analysis; installed serviceable spare
